perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a black top, stands in a kitchen-like setting behind a pot of steaming noodles. She holds a large portion of noodles with chopsticks and talks directly to the camera with high energy. (2) She uses a large serving spoon to gather an enormous amount of noodles and takes a massive, exaggerated bite, filling her mouth completely. (3) The scene cuts as she introduces a crispy pastry and a large white dessert, subsequently taking another giant bite of the mochi-like sweet while looking directly into the lens with a wide-eyed expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, rhythmic pop music with a steady beat begins. A female voice speaks in Mandarin with a very high-pitched, excited, and rapid tone. (2) Loud slurping and chewing sounds are clearly audible over the background music as the speaker eats. (3) The female voice continues to narrate enthusiastically, describing the food and responding to hypothetical questions, ending with a cheerful sign-off tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "台灣人" (Taiwanese) - Hook. (2) "三口減肥法" (Three-bite diet method) - Hook. (3) "這個韓國最新流行" (This is the latest Korean trend) - Informative. (4) "任何東西都可以吃 但只能吃三口" (You can eat anything but only three bites) - Informative hook. (5) "第一口製作中" (Preparing the first bite) - Functional. (6) "這個是火雞辣炒湯麵" (This is Buldak spicy chicken soup noodles) - Functional. (7) "好久沒吃了真的超好吃" (Haven't eaten this in a long time, really delicious) - Emotional. (8) "拜託 一定要加蛋!!" (Please, you must add an egg!!) - Suggestive hook. (9) "蘿蔔絲酥餅" (Radish shreds crispy pastry) - Functional. (10) "巨大" (Huge) - Emphatic hook. (11) "記得把此篇Reels分享給需要這方法的朋友們" (Remember to share this Reel with friends who need this method) - Functional CTA.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Demonstration of giant first bite -> Secondary food items -> Dessert bite -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator appearing as the main subject throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, straight brown hair, wearing a black long-sleeved top with a subtle logo.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting with a wooden table, a stainless steel pot, and blurred interior furniture in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural bright light with soft shadows.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Logic of the 'diet' -> Visual proof through eating -> Humor -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience by satirizing popular 'diet' trends through a mukbang format. The creator uses the 'three-bite rule' as a comedic framing device to consume massive amounts of spicy noodles and desserts in single, oversized bites.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: General lifestyle food content without explicit sponsor mentions or sales links.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Extreme 'one-bite' eating style, fast-paced high-pitched Mandarin narration.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets social media trends by combining mukbang with a comedic twist on weight loss methods, likely aiming for viral engagement through visual shock value (the size of the bites).
